name: Onion Flowers'n' Dip
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 425°F. Coat roasting pan with cooking spray.
Peel onions; place stem-side down. Cut onions into wedges up to ends but not through.
In microwave on plate, cook onions 10-12 minutes. Cool.
Place buttermilk in small bowl.
In a separate bowl, mix the next four ingredients (all-purpose flour, cornmeal, cayenne pepper, and salt).
Dip onions in buttermilk, allowing excess to drip off.
Dip in flour mixture, turning to coat the onion well.
Place stem-side down on the pan. Spray onions generously with cooking spray.
Bake 35 minutes until browned and tender.
In a bowl, combine remaining ingredients (yogurt, mayonnaise, cucumber, and lime juice).
Serve with CUCUMBER DIP.
